channel.title: Carl Icahn — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Carl Icahn: ADDED DNUT (+22%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) added DNUT in Q4 2025 · 2.9% of portfolio. Adding to the Krispy Kreme recovery play.

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED OXY (-12%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed OXY in Q4 2025 · 4.2% of portfolio. Continued Occidental trim.

item.title: Carl Icahn: ADDED DNUT (+18%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) added DNUT in Q3 2025 · 2.4% of portfolio. Adding to Krispy Kreme.

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED OXY (-15%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed OXY in Q3 2025 · 4.8% of portfolio. Pullback from Occidental.

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED SWK (-20%) · Q3 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed SWK (Southwest Gas Holdings Inc.) in Q3 2025 · 5.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED OXY (-20%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed OXY in Q2 2025 · 5.6% of portfolio. Starting the Occidental pullback.

item.title: Carl Icahn: EXITED DANA (-100%) · Q2 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) exited DANA (Dana Inc.) in Q2 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED SWK (-22%) · Q1 2025
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed SWK (Southwest Gas Holdings Inc.) in Q1 2025 · 7.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Carl Icahn: TRIMMED SWK (-13%) · Q4 2024
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) trimmed SWK (Southwest Gas Holdings Inc.) in Q4 2024 · 9.2% of portfolio.

item.title: Carl Icahn: EXITED OXY (-100%) · Q2 2024
item.description: Carl Icahn (Icahn Enterprises) exited OXY (Occidental Petroleum Corp Wts) in Q2 2024 · 0.0% of portfolio.
